body_txt: A fictionalized version of an author who appears as a character in the events of the story. While many characters may be inspired by some aspect of their creator (it's hard to write a hero you have nothing in common with) an Author Avatar is a direct analog, as if the author were dropped directly into the world they've created. Good signs you are looking at an Author Avatar include: looking identical to the creator (or being played by the director), sharing strong political viewpoints with the creator, being named after the author or having a very similar name, sharing life circumstances or family situations, and being declared an Author Avatar by Word of God . In some cases, the avatar takes on the role of providing commentary for the story and delivering the author's verdict. Related tropes include:
